title: Scenario Execution Sub-Phase
description: Sub-phase 002 of the Search Intelligence Stress-Test Playbook. Execution scaffold consuming 001's dispatch matrix: pre-flight contract, dispatch loop architecture, per-run output capture schema, manual scoring workflow, and findings aggregation format. Actual runs deferred to a dedicated execution session. 27 base cells (9 scenarios × 3 CLIs) plus ≥3 ablation cells (cli-opencode --agent context).
